hero.title: Adon ERP Success Packs
hero.subtitle: 98% implementation success rate, vs 65% without success pack (self-implemented).

notes: * Travel time billed; Travel expenses billed separately.
** Extra monthly charges apply for maintenance.
*** A 15% discount applies automatically to new customers.

faqs.question: What do the Success Packs include?
faqs.answer: Success Packs include dedicated consultant hours, project management, training, configuration assistance, and ongoing support to ensure successful implementation.

faqs.question: What will the 'Dedicated Customer Success Consultant' do?
faqs.answer: Your dedicated consultant will guide you through setup, provide best practices, assist with configuration, and ensure your team is trained properly.

faqs.question: What if I have custom needs that require developments and ad hoc integration?
faqs.answer: Our team can handle custom developments and integrations. Custom and Pro packs include development hours, and additional hours can be purchased.

faqs.question: What should I do if I have performance issues?
faqs.answer: Performance issues are covered under all Success Packs. Our team will diagnose and resolve any performance-related concerns promptly.

faqSection.title: Any Questions?
faqSection.description: If the answer to your question is not on this page, please contact our Account Managers.
